const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|legal search/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description));
text(matches);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"large-capacity magazines\" Bruen -Duncan",filed_after:"2024-01-01",fields:["absolute_url","caseName","court_citation_string","dateFiled","citation","snippet"],num_results:10,order_by:"score desc"});
